description_long: This jewelry object consists of a pair of large, statement earrings attached to a human head model. Each earring features three distinct, irregularly shaped segments in soft, muted tones of beige, peach, and light blue, arranged vertically and connected in a cascading fashion. The segments have a smooth, slightly matte finish, giving them a contemporary and artistic appearance. The earrings are bold and eye-catching, designed to hang from the earlobes and extend down toward the jawline. The overall design is abstract, with organic, flowing shapes that evoke a modern, minimalist aesthetic. There are no visible gemstones or intricate engravings, emphasizing the clean lines and color-blocked motif.
description: A pair of large, abstract, multi-segment earrings in muted pastel tones, featuring smooth, organic shapes and a modern minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view shows both earrings symmetrically, highlighting their cascading, multi-segment design and soft color palette.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the profile of the left earring, emphasizing the layered, irregular shapes and their vertical arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the earrings partially obscured by the head, with only the outer edges visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the right earring's profile, mirroring the left and showcasing the same cascading, abstract segments.
